case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION vs. LUKE, JANET et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT LUKE, JANET

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LUKE, JANET
